_comments.purpose: AI Search retrieval configuration for Multi-Modal Document Processing play
_comments.usage: Configure search over multi-modal extracted content (text, tables, images)

hybrid_weights._comment: Higher vector weight for multi-modal content where semantic understanding is critical

multi_modal_search._comment: Enable image vector search for figure/diagram queries

relevance_thresholds._comment: Slightly lower for multi-modal content where OCR/extraction may affect quality
